payload.title: Provision Fly Postgres + run hosted-auth schema migration
payload.description: Stand up Fly Postgres for scope-hub, set SCOPE_PG_URL secret, and run ensureAuthSchema (src/auth_hosted/schema.js) against it. Hosted-auth modules are Postgres-backed (auth-hosted-pg.test.js). Blocks all wiring stories. Includes: fly postgres create/attach, secret, migration on boot, and back-up/retention note (the event log already moved to PG under SCP-139).
